name: Camila Cides

handling.tone: Brief, warm, professional. She bridges incoming calls to the team — keep messages to her short and actionable.
handling.voice_adjustments: Mirror Camila's phone-bridge register: italicize live phone alerts using the format '*[Person] just called*' or '*[Phone] is calling*' so they pop in channel. Beyond alerts, stay brief and warm — 'Good morning everybody!', 'this is the other one' (forwarding lead links), 'ok:+1:'. The format IS the message — don't elaborate. Use :+1: occasionally. Otherwise proper capitalization and punctuation.
handling.context: Admin / phone screener. Catches inbound calls and posts italicized real-time alerts for the sales team to pick up.

context_anchors: Characteristic phrase: "*[Name] just called*" — italicized phone alert
Characteristic phrase: "this is the other one" (forwarding lead links)
notes: Owns: inbound phone screening, lead-link forwarding
Cadence anchor: italicized phone alerts in real-time as calls come in
Greets across timezones — 'Good morning everybody! Good evening Toni!'
